rows.body:
Reese,

I reached out last week about the workspace overage question your team filed. Since then, we scanned 40+ FlowPilot support queues and found the same billing question in 60% of them.

That pattern means the answer is either missing from the docs or buried where users cannot find it. Either way, your team is answering it manually every time.

We built a ticket-to-content audit that finds these gaps in under 10 minutes. You get a ranked list of the questions that should be self-serve, the docs that need to exist, and the ticket volume you will cut when you close the gap.

For billing questions like the workspace overage one, teams usually see 2-3 fewer tickets per week after publishing the missing FAQ.

Here is the audit intake: https://finetunelab.ai/systems/ai-content-ops/intake

FineTune Lab
Content Ops Team
rows.cta: Run the audit and see which gaps are costing you the most tickets.

rows.subject: The workspace overage question came back

rows.body:
Reese,

Your team asked how to see which workspace caused a usage overage. That question should have been answered in your docs before the ticket was filed.

We run FAQ gap audits for support teams using FlowPilot. We scan your ticket queue, find the repeat questions that should be self-serve, and show you which docs are missing or buried.

For billing and plan management questions like yours, the gap usually costs 2-3 tickets per week. That adds up.

We published a short breakdown of how support teams close these gaps: https://finetunelab.ai/systems/ai-content-ops/intake

Worth a look if you want to cut repeat tickets.

FineTune Lab
Content Ops Team
